_note: Hero cases for the L1.5 Signal Console. L1 facts + pre-computed L1.5 signals. Signal metrics are the headline numbers from the real eval harness (layer2-ai-application/shared/evaluation/*_eval.py over the 55,500-row / 40K-patient synthetic corpus). The agent reads LABELED signals, it does not compute them.

cases.title: ER Triage
cases.truth_says: 82yo, history of MI, but a single snapshot could read as 'old but stable'.
cases.signal_says: Anomaly score 0.87 + complex-utilizer cohort + ESI-2 classify all push urgency UP.
cases.agent_says: Escalate to clinician review NOW. Move from WAIT → NOW.

cases.title: Ops Capacity
cases.truth_says: Beds available now — looks fine at this instant.
cases.signal_says: Forecast + arrival-rate anomaly say capacity tightens within 4 hours.
cases.agent_says: Pre-alert staffing now; surface to ops dashboard before it's a crisis.

cases.title: Executive Brief

signals.name: Cluster (Treasure Map)
signals.value: 535 complex high-utilizers drive most of the lift

cases.truth_says: Readmission KPI is rising — the chart shows the number.
cases.signal_says: Forecast says it continues; cluster pins the lift on 535 high-utilizers.
cases.agent_says: Generate a risk briefing targeting the high-utilizer cohort for case management.
